docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: REDUCTION IN FILING FEE PURSUANT TO BUSINESS AND PROFESSIONS CODE SECTION 6322.1 (TRANSACTION ID # 75557902) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC.

SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 75557902) TO PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 75635621), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC. SERVED FEB-10-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MANCIA, DIANA

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $275.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 76725380) AS TO DEFENDANT MANCIA, DIANA
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED ($.00 ON INTEREST, $.00 ON PRINCIPAL), $19.99 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS, (TRANSACTION ID # 79746655) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 75557902) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MANCIA, DIANA DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-30-2025
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 76725380) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION RE: CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 1033; INTEREST; AND EVIDENCE CODE 1550 (TRANSACTION ID # 76725380) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC.
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO C.C.P. 585(D) AND 1788.60 (TRANSACTION ID # 76725380) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MANCIA, DIANA $1,157.92 PRINCIPAL, $275.00 COSTS, $100.00 CREDIT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,332.92, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
